author: newjordan
name: Mikey_1.2
technique_summary: Mikey 1.1 (eval-fix) + score-first TTT (PR #1493 precedent). After baseline artifact-sliding eval, eval_val_ttt scores each 32k-token chunk under no_grad, then SGD-trains on it (lr=0.005 cosine, momentum=0.9, 3 epochs). Headline = better of plain artifact-sliding vs TTT.
pending: val_bpb is null until the 8xH100 run lands. Run Mikey 1.1 first to lock the baseline, then 1.2 measures the TTT delta on top.
